title: [ExportVerilog] Mux Tree Lowering Producing Busted Verilog

features.name: array indexing on concatenation expression
features.description: Code should include an array index operation applied directly to a concatenation expression, where the concatenation forms an unpacked array

features.name: array_create with multiple elements
features.description: Code should include an array creation operation using hw.array_create or SystemVerilog concatenation with multiple element operands forming an unpacked array
